summary: Completed testing of P1 features for Bookvia: (1) next_available_text field in business search/featured endpoints, (2) distance_km field with user location, (3) Photo gallery with carousel on mobile and lightbox on desktop, (4) Mobile navbar menu with Citas/Favoritos/Notificaciones links for logged-in users, (5) Mobile search page with filter button and stacked inputs. All features working correctly.

issues: Business photos for 'Test Real Stripe' are broken/showing alt text - expected per context (photos from previous preview)

Backend: next_available_text format validation (Hoy disponible, Manana HH:MM, Dia HH:MM) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses with user_lat/user_lng returns distance_km - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses without location has null distance_km - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status - PASSED
Frontend: Search page loads with data-testid='search-page' - PASSED
Frontend: BusinessCard shows next_available_text in green (emerald-600) with Clock icon - PASSED (found 'Manana 09:00', 'Manana 10:00')
Frontend: Business profile page loads with photo grid (4 images visible, +2 fotos button) - PASSED
Frontend: Desktop lightbox opens with prev/next navigation buttons - PASSED
Frontend: Mobile photo carousel with dot indicators (7 dots) and counter (1/7) - PASSED

Frontend: Mobile search page has filter button ('Filtros') - PASSED

critical_code_review_comments: next_available_text computation in server.py (lines 2260-2310, 2342-2384) correctly iterates through workers' schedules to find next available slot
BusinessCard.jsx correctly displays next_available_text with Clock icon and emerald-600 color (lines 110-115)
PhotoGrid component in BusinessProfilePage.jsx properly handles mobile carousel (Carousel from Shadcn) and desktop grid layout with lightbox
Navbar.jsx mobile menu correctly shows Citas/Favoritos/Notificaciones links for non-business, non-admin authenticated users (lines 503-531)
SearchPage.jsx mobile view properly shows filter button and stacked inputs
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing businesses in MX country.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested: (1) next_available_text shows 'Hoy disponible', 'Manana HH:MM', or 'Dia HH:MM' based on worker schedules. (2) distance_km returned when user_lat/user_lng provided. (3) Photo gallery: desktop shows grid with lightbox, mobile shows swipeable carousel with dot indicators. (4) Mobile navbar for logged-in users shows Mis Reservas, Favoritos, Notificaciones links. (5) Country must be set to MX via navbar selector to see businesses. Note: CORS warning for ipapi.co is expected (geolocation fallback).
console_warnings: CORS warning for ipapi.co/json - expected, this is a geolocation fallback service
Missing Description for DialogContent - minor accessibility warning in filter sheet
